name: Supply Chain Due Diligence Management System
description: Comprehensive management system for mineral supply chain due diligence aligned with the OECD five-step framework. Requires the facility to establish and maintain a supply chain due diligence policy, implement a management structure with senior accountability, maintain a chain of custody and traceability system covering all mineral inputs, conduct regular risk assessments of the supply chain including identification of conflict-affected and high-risk areas, implement risk mitigation measures with corrective action plans, commission independent third-party audits, and publicly report on due diligence activities and findings.

conformityTopic.name: Ethical Material Sourcing
conformityTopic.definition: Procuring raw materials through sustainable and responsible practices, avoiding conflict minerals and environmentally destructive extraction.

score.definition: Facility meets all applicable requirements for supply chain due diligence.
